# Aiva Wellness

> Aiva Wellness is an Indian nutraceutical company offering premium health and wellness supplements focused on heart health, immunity, bone health, and everyday nutrition.

Aiva Wellness is committed to providing high-quality dietary supplements manufactured to international quality standards. Our products are designed to support healthier lifestyles through science-backed nutrition.

## Company Information

- **Company:** Aiva Wellness
- **Website:** https://aivawellness.in
- **Industry:** Nutraceuticals & Dietary Supplements
- **Country:** India
- **Email:** info@aivawellness.in

## Products

- Vitamin D3 – Supports bone, muscle, and immune health.
- Nattokinase – Supports cardiovascular and circulatory health.
- Omega-3 Fish Oil – Supports heart, brain, and joint health.

## Marketplace

- Amazon
- Flipkart

## Important Pages

- [Home](https://aivawellness.in/) – Overview of Aiva Wellness and featured products.

- [Products](https://aivawellness.in/shop.html) – Explore our complete supplement range.
- [Contact](https://aivawellness.in/contact.html) – Get in touch with our team.

## Expertise

- Nutraceutical Products
- Dietary Supplements
- Preventive Healthcare
- Wellness Nutrition
- Heart Health
- Immunity Support
- Bone Health
- Daily Wellness

## Mission

Our mission is to improve everyday health by delivering safe, effective, and science-backed nutritional supplements that people can trust.
